allow: Bash(lsof -ti:3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; lsof -ti:3001 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1)

Bash(curl -s "https://newtrackon.com/" 2>&1 | python3 -c " import sys, re, json html = sys.stdin.read\(\) # Extract rows between thead end and table end rows = re.findall\(r'\\s*\(.*?\)', html, re.DOTALL\) trackers = [] for row in rows[:3]: cells = re.findall\(r']*>\(.*?\)', row, re.DOTALL\) if len\(cells\) >= 9: tracker = { 'url': cells[0].strip\(\), 'uptime': cells[1].strip\(\), 'status_raw': cells[2].strip\(\), 'latency': cells[8].strip\(\), } # Extract country country = re.search\(r'\\s*\(\\w[\\w\\s]*\)', cells[6]\) tracker['country'] = country.group\(1\).strip\(\) if country else '' # Extract network network = re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', '', cells[7]\).strip\(\).split\('\\n'\)[0].strip\(\) tracker['network'] = network # Status if 'Working' in cells[2]: duration = re.search\(r'Working for \(.*?\)<', cells[2]\) tracker['status'] = 'up' tracker['status_duration'] = duration.group\(1\).strip\(\) if duration else '' else: duration = re.search\(r'Down for \(.*?\)<', cells[2]\) tracker['status'] = 'down' tracker['status_duration'] = duration.group\(1\).strip\(\) if duration else '' trackers.append\(tracker\) print\(json.dumps\(trackers, indent=2\)\) " 2>&1 | head -40)

Bash(curl -s "https://newtrackon.com/" 2>&1 | python3 -c " import sys, re, json from html.parser import HTMLParser html = sys.stdin.read\(\) # Split into rows properly - find all td content in order # Each tracker row has exactly 10 td cells all_tds = re.findall\(r']*>\(.*?\)', html, re.DOTALL\) # Skip header row tds \(th tags\), start from first data row # Group tds into rows of 10 rows = [all_tds[i:i+10] for i in range\(0, len\(all_tds\), 10\)] trackers = [] for row in rows[:3]: if len\(row\) < 10: continue url = re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', '', row[0]\).strip\(\) uptime = re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', '', row[1]\).strip\(\) status_html = row[2] if 'Working' in status_html: status = 'up' m = re.search\(r'Working for \(.*?\)<', status_html\) duration = m.group\(1\).strip\(\) if m else '' else: status = 'down' m = re.search\(r'Down for \(.*?\)<', status_html\) duration = m.group\(1\).strip\(\) if m else '' ip_raw = re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', ' ', row[5]\).strip\(\) ips = [x.strip\(\) for x in ip_raw.split\(\) if x.strip\(\)] country_match = re.findall\(r'\\s*\([\\w\\s]+\)', row[6]\) countries = [c.strip\(\) for c in country_match if c.strip\(\)] network = re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', ' ', row[7]\).strip\(\).split\(\) network = ' '.join\(network[:3]\) if network else '' latency = re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', '', row[8]\).strip\(\) added = re.sub\(r'<[^>]+>', '', row[9]\).strip\(\) trackers.append\({ 'url': url, 'uptime': uptime, 'status': status, 'status_duration': duration, 'ips': ips, 'country': countries[0] if countries else '', 'network': network, 'latency': latency, 'added': added, }\) print\(json.dumps\(trackers[:5], indent=2\)\) print\(f'Total rows parsed: {len\(trackers\)}'\) " 2>&1)
Bash(rm -f data/trackers.json && lsof -ti:3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1)
Bash(sleep 3 && curl -s http://localhost:3000/torrent-trackers-list 2>&1 | grep -o 'List View\\|Detailed View\\|Live\\|tracker-database' | head -10)
Bash(lsof -ti:3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1 && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -30)

Bash(sleep 10 && echo "=== ROBOTS.TXT ===" && curl -s http://localhost:3000/robots.txt && echo "" && echo "=== SITEMAP ===" && curl -s http://localhost:3000/sitemap.xml && echo "" && echo "=== META TAGS ===" && curl -s http://localhost:3000/torrent-trackers-list | grep -oP '<meta[^>]+>' | head -20 && echo "" && echo "=== STRUCTURED DATA ===" && curl -s http://localhost:3000/torrent-trackers-list | grep -o 'application/ld+json' | wc -l && echo "JSON-LD blocks found" && echo "" && echo "=== OG IMAGE ===" && curl -sI http://localhost:3000/og-torrent-trackers.png | head -5)
Bash(lsof -ti:3000 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; sleep 1 && docker build -t trackers-list . 2>&1 | tail -20)
